title: Light Spicy Thai Chicken Noodles
description: A savory and light Thai dish featuring chilli sauce and pickled vegetables, perfect for a low-fat friendly meal. This indulgent noodle dish is made with lean chicken and a variety of spices.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chilli sauce, soy sauce, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Add the pickle slices to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the ingredients are well combined.
